Thomas Haase
I am a BA social science student at Justus-Liebig-University Gießen and also serve as a tutor for empirical methods and statistics.
Experience

Empirical methods & data collection procedures
Statistics

Student assistent for organizing a research and network conference with around 50 participants of the BMBF funding programm International Humanities and Social Sciences

title: How to make a Quarto-Website
text:
List of Tutorials
This Videoseries explains the basics:
https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLkrJrLs7xfbXcEKhTCKRSr2VXH4yiBeXo&feature=shared


This tutorial explains how to link a Quartowebsite and a Quartoblog together:
https://samanthacsik.github.io/posts/2022-10-24-quarto-blogs/


With this tutorial you can learn how to customize your quartopage:
https://ucsb-meds.github.io/customizing-quarto-websites/#/title-slide


After that the only thing you need is the brilliant quarto-documentation: https://quarto.org/docs/websites/


Why Githubpages
Downsides:

no custom URL
public Code

Why it’s still the best Option (for me)

easiest deployment ever
free !!!

title: blabla
text:
My Uni-Journey so far
I’m dedicated to my BA social sciences program at Justus-Liebig-University Gießen with great passion. Before that I studied 2 Semesters of Physics at Justus-Liebig-University Gießen where I recieved a good basic mathematical education and understood what passion for your subject of study really means.
After change of subject I started studying social science with the same workload as I had in physics, wich resulted in the Opportunity
